description:
You are a computer systems analyst reviewing the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document in the Smart Home example project in ReqView. Restructure the document by moving the 4th top-level section, including all its child requirements, to become the 2nd top-level section. Save the project and create a text file at /home/ga/reorder_result.txt containing exactly three lines:
- Line 1: The ID and heading text of the section you moved (e.g., 'SRS.17 External Interfaces')
- Line 2: The ID and heading text of the section that now immediately follows it
- Line 3: The total number of top-level sections in the SRS document (just the number)
